channel.title: Spring Lake Surf Conditions — Remsen Ave
channel.description: Daily 7-day surf forecast for Remsen Ave & Ocean Ave N, Spring Lake, NJ

item.title: 7-Day Surf Forecast — 2026-07-04 to 2026-07-10
item.description: 0 IDEAL, 2 INTERESTING, 5 NOT IDEAL over the next 7 days. Sat 2026-07-04: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 1.7 ft @ 6.8 sec, wind 6 kt W, water 67°F. Low tide: 04:41, 16:42. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Sun 2026-07-05: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 1.6 ft @ 6.8 sec, wind 9 kt SSE, water 68°F. Low tide: 05:15, 17:26. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wind direction off (SSE). Mon 2026-07-06: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 3.3 ft @ 4.8 sec, wind 11 kt SE, water 68°F. Low tide: 05:54, 18:21. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (3.3 ft); period too short (4.8 sec); wind direction off (SE). Tue 2026-07-07: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 3.1 ft @ 5.1 sec, wind 7 kt N, water 68°F. Low tide: 06:40, 19:31. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (3.1 ft); period too short (5.1 sec); wind direction off (N). Wed 2026-07-08: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 4.7 ft @ 5.4 sec, wind 7 kt NNE, water 68°F. Low tide: 07:37, 20:45. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (4.7 ft); period too short (5.4 sec); wind direction off (NNE). Thu 2026-07-09: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.5 ft @ 6.8 sec, wind 7 kt WSW, water 69°F. Low tide: 08:40, 21:52. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.5 ft). Fri 2026-07-10: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 10:00, 2.4 ft @ 6.7 sec, wind 6 kt NW, water 70°F. Low tide: 09:43, 22:54. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
item.content:encoded:
0 IDEAL, 2 INTERESTING, 5 NOT IDEAL over the next 7 days.

  • Sat 2026-07-04: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 1.7 ft @ 6.8 sec, wind 6 kt W, water 67°F. Low tide: 04:41, 16:42. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
  • Sun 2026-07-05: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 1.6 ft @ 6.8 sec, wind 9 kt SSE, water 68°F. Low tide: 05:15, 17:26. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wind direction off (SSE).
  • Mon 2026-07-06: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 3.3 ft @ 4.8 sec, wind 11 kt SE, water 68°F. Low tide: 05:54, 18:21. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (3.3 ft); period too short (4.8 sec); wind direction off (SE).
  • Tue 2026-07-07: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 3.1 ft @ 5.1 sec, wind 7 kt N, water 68°F. Low tide: 06:40, 19:31. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (3.1 ft); period too short (5.1 sec); wind direction off (N).
  • Wed 2026-07-08: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 4.7 ft @ 5.4 sec, wind 7 kt NNE, water 68°F. Low tide: 07:37, 20:45. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (4.7 ft); period too short (5.4 sec); wind direction off (NNE).
  • Thu 2026-07-09: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.5 ft @ 6.8 sec, wind 7 kt WSW, water 69°F. Low tide: 08:40, 21:52. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.5 ft).
  • Fri 2026-07-10: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 10:00, 2.4 ft @ 6.7 sec, wind 6 kt NW, water 70°F. Low tide: 09:43, 22:54. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
